HELIOS - HomogEneous and Layered medIa Optical Scattering
C++ surface integral equation (SIE) code for homogeneous and layered media scattering

6#include "DomainHom3DPer.h"
7#include <iostream>
8#include "GreenFHom3DPer2D.h"
9
10// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
11// Construction & lifetime
12// -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
13
14
20DomainHom3DPer::DomainHom3DPer(SurfaceMesh *inMesh, int inDIndex,
21 dcmplx inEpsilon, dcmplx inMu,
22 dcmplx inVacuumWavelength, rvec blochVector,
23 std::vector<rvec> latticeVectors)
24 : DomainHom3D(inMesh, inDIndex, inEpsilon, inMu, inVacuumWavelength, 1) {
25 if (latticeVectors.size() == 2) {
26 grnFun = new GreenFHom3DPer2D(vacuumWavelength, epsilon, mu, blochVector,
27 latticeVectors[0], latticeVectors[1]);
28 } else {
29 std::cout << "Warning: number of lattice vectors different than 2"
30 << std::endl;
31 // NOTE : This is where the call to periodic Green's functions in 1 or 3
32 // directions can be inserted
33 // In these cases, the size of latticeVectors would be either 1 or 3
34 }
35}
36
37DomainHom3DPer::~DomainHom3DPer() { delete grnFun; }
DomainHom3DPer.h
Homogeneous 3D domain with in‑plane periodicity (derived from DomainHom3D).
GreenFHom3DPer2D.h
Periodic homogeneous 3D Green's function with 2D in‑plane periodicity.
